name: Interlaken Rattan Seat and Back Dining Chair - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Honey Yellow, No Assembly Required
description:
Bring traditional charm to your dining area with this Interlaken Rattan with Woven Seat and Back Dining Chair from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Woven with rattan, with a curved back and rounded seat for artistic appeal, this natural dining chair brings texture and eye-catching style to your dining space that works well with a variety of decor styles. Use this armless woven chair in your dining area for family dining or any other space for accommodating extra guests.

Meet Shea McGee, the designer and stylist behind the brand Studio McGee. Founded alongside her husband, Syd, the studio is known for Shea’s design of beautifully elevated spaces that encourage clients to surround themselves with the things and people they love. Now she’s partnering with Threshold to offer Studio McGee’s classic design in a new collection for inspired homes, everywhere.

Overall Width: 18.9 inches
Overall Height: 35.6 inches
Overall Depth (at floor): 22 inches
Seat Height: 17.7 inches
